scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend
scripts.lint:frontend: npm --prefix apps/kmi run lint && npm --prefix apps/infopedia run lint
scripts.test:frontend: npm --prefix apps/kmi run test && npm --prefix apps/infopedia run test
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.validate: npm run lint && npm run test && PYTHONPYCACHEPREFIX=/tmp/kms-pyc python -m compileall -q apps packages && npm --prefix apps/kmi run build && npm --prefix apps/infopedia run build
